sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45175" key="eu)stibh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐστῐβής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">στείβω</etym>) <sense id="n45175.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well-trodden</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αἰθυίαις λέπας</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
